name: frontend-taste-engineer
description: Rough-prompt-to-production frontend generation with context-adaptive planning, building, auditing, refinement, privacy review, and verification.

interface.shortDescription: Paste a rough frontend idea, then polish and run it
interface.longDescription: Select Frontend Taste Engineer in the composer, paste a rough frontend request, and send once. It preserves intent and literal copy, silently forms a clear execution brief, chooses a proportionate workflow, and builds or improves a distinctive, responsive, accessible, screenshot-refined frontend. Use rewrite-only when you want the polished prompt without execution.
defaultPrompt: Polish this rough frontend prompt and run it end to end:
Rewrite this frontend prompt so it is clear and complete, but do not run it:
Make a website for this idea.
Design and build a distinctive, production-ready landing page for this product.
Audit this frontend and fix its highest-impact usability and design problems.
Rebuild this screenshot responsively while preserving accessibility.
